title: Jack Returns
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on jack returns within the The Elephant Speaks storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everything's about to blow! What exactly is gunisha experiencing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whaddaya mean! Can't you guys hear it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's getting louder! That one was the loudest so far!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aim for that spot on its left foreleg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The beast is finally starting to feel it!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Even your average elephant will stampede at the sight of just a single bee.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If this thing really has been alive for a thousand years,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then its skin ought to have become weak and aged!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A living legend? Hah! More like a half-dead relic!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's it! If we force it to its knees, we can get near its head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then we can finish it off how- ever we like!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gouge out its eyes and cut off its tongue? Excellent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RIP through its belly from the inside out? Wonderful!

summary: Jack Returns: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
